full_text:
Yuan Chunqing 袁春卿
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yuan Chunqing (袁春卿)was born in Ruyang county, Runan commandery. Part of Ye’s defence, Cao Cao tried to get him to defect by hiring Chunqing’s father. Yuan Chunqing was affiliated with Yuan Shang.
